pi_items.source: Task design parameter. This is a scoring threshold, not a factual claim about external data. Consistent with the task's very_hard difficulty (other hard tasks use 60-75).

Cross-referenced with playbook file (line 20: 'Name: Asia-Pacific Operations') and setup_task.sh cleanup query (line 54: DELETE FROM main_businessunits WHERE unitname='Asia-Pacific Operations'). Consistent across all three files.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 29: 'Name: APAC Product Engineering'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 50), and export_result.sh query (line 25: deptname='APAC Product Engineering'). Consistent across all files.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 30: 'Code: APAC-PE'). Note: code is in the playbook but NOT verified by export_result.sh (which only checks deptname, not deptcode). The agent must enter this code but it won't affect scoring.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 34: 'Name: APAC Client Solutions'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 51), and export_result.sh query (line 26). Consistent across all files.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 35: 'Code: APAC-CS'). Same note as APAC-PE — present in playbook but not in export verification queries.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 44: 'Title 1: Regional Engineering Director'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 46), export_result.sh query (line 42). This title does NOT pre-exist in the DB (confirmed via live testing: db_job_titles.txt shows 16 titles, none matching).

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 47: 'Title 2: Client Solutions Architect'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 47), export_result.sh query (line 43). Does NOT pre-exist in DB (confirmed via live testing).

Playbook specifies Employee ID as '025' (line 58). Sentrifugo's Add Employee form accepts numeric-only IDs. The system may store this as '025' or 'EMP025' depending on auto-prefix behavior. export_result.sh handles both patterns (line 51: OR employeeId='${empid#EMP0}' OR employeeId='${empid#EMP}'). The metadata value 'EMP025' is the canonical reference; actual DB value may be '025'.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 60: 'First Name: Wei'). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 61: 'Last Name: Chen'). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 64: 'Department: APAC Product Engineering'). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 65: 'Job Title: Regional Engineering Director'). Consistent.
Playbook specifies '026' (line 70). Same pattern as EMP025 — canonical reference is EMP026, actual DB may be '026'. export_result.sh handles both.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 72: 'First Name: Priya'). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 73: 'Last Name: Sharma'). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 76: 'Department: APAC Client Solutions'). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 77: 'Job Title: Client Solutions Architect'). Consistent.
Playbook specifies '027' (line 82). Same employee ID pattern. export_result.sh handles both formats.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 84: 'First Name: Kenji'). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 85: 'Last Name: Tanaka'). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 88: 'Department: APAC Product Engineering'). Consistent.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 89: 'Job Title: Software Engineer'). This title already exists in DB as id=2 (confirmed via live testing: db_job_titles.txt). Agent does NOT need to create it, only select it from the dropdown.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 99: 'Leave Type: Childcare Leave'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 43), and export_result.sh query (line 116). Consistent. This is a real Singapore statutory leave type per MOM (mom.gov.sg/employment-practices/leave/childcare-leave).

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 100: 'Leave Code: CCL'). Note: export_result.sh does NOT verify the leave code — only the leave name and number of days. The code must be entered but won't affect scoring.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 101: 'Days: 6') and export_result.sh query (line 116: numberofdays). Independently confirmed: Singapore's Child Development Co-Savings Act provides 6 days of Government-Paid Childcare Leave per year for parents of citizen children under 7 (confirmed via MOM.gov.sg).
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 111: 'Group Name: Singapore Office Holidays 2026'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 36), and export_result.sh query (line 123). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 113). Independently confirmed as a Singapore public holiday via MOM press release (mom.gov.sg/newsroom/press-releases/2025/0616-public-holidays-for-2026).
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 113: '2026-01-01'). Independently confirmed: New Year's Day is always January 1 globally. Singapore MOM confirms 1 January 2026 as a public holiday.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 114). Singapore MOM confirms Chinese New Year 2026 falls on 17-18 February.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 114: '2026-02-17'). Independently confirmed: Chinese New Year 2026 Day 1 is 17 February 2026 (Year of the Horse). Confirmed via Singapore MOM official announcement and timeanddate.com.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 115). Singapore National Day is always 9 August — a fixed public holiday.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 115: '2026-08-09'). Independently confirmed: Singapore National Day is fixed at 9 August every year. In 2026, 9 August falls on a Sunday, so the in-lieu holiday is Monday 10 August, but the gazetted date remains 9 August. MOM confirms this.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 124: 'Name: APAC Regional Program'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 19: tm_clients WHERE client_name='APAC Regional Program'), and export_result.sh query (line 144). Consistent across all files.

Cross-referenced with playbook (line 128: 'Name: Singapore Office Launch'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 12: tm_projects WHERE project_name='Singapore Office Launch'), and export_result.sh query (line 152). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 133: 'a. Office Infrastructure Setup'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 21), and export_result.sh query (line 168: tm_tasks.task). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 134: 'b. Client Onboarding Pipeline'), setup_task.sh cleanup (line 21), and export_result.sh query (line 168). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 137: 'Assign Wei Chen (EMP025)'). export_result.sh checks via tm_project_employees JOIN main_users (line 172). Consistent.
Cross-referenced with playbook (line 137: 'and Priya Sharma (EMP026)'). export_result.sh checks same JOIN. Consistent.

Playbook specifies full title as 'APAC Regional Expansion — Singapore Office Opening' (line 146). Metadata uses partial match 'APAC Regional Expansion'. export_result.sh uses LIKE '%APAC Regional Expansion%' (line 178), which will match both the full title and the partial metadata value. Consistent.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires configuring Sentrifugo HRMS for a new Singapore regional office by executing a playbook document on the Desktop. The agent must create 20 entities across 8 modules in dependency order. Section 1: Create business unit 'Asia-Pacific Operations' (code APAC), then two departments under it — 'APAC Product Engineering' (code APAC-PE) and 'APAC Client Solutions' (code APAC-CS). Section 2: Create two job titles — 'Regional Engineering Director' (code RED-SG-01) and 'Client Solutions Architect' (code CSA-SG-01). Note: 'Software Engineer' already exists in the system (id=2) and does NOT need to be created. Section 3: Onboard three employees — Wei Chen (ID 025, Mr., APAC Product Engineering, Regional Engineering Director), Priya Sharma (ID 026, Ms., APAC Client Solutions, Client Solutions Architect), and Kenji Tanaka (ID 027, Mr., APAC Product Engineering, Software Engineer). All three have joining date 2026-03-17, email pattern firstname.lastname@acmeglobe.com, status Full-Time, reporting to James Anderson (EMP001, user_id=2). The Employee ID field accepts numbers only (025, 026, 027 — not EMP025). Section 4: Create leave type 'Childcare Leave' (code CCL, 6 days, preallocated Yes). 6 days matches Singapore's actual statutory entitlement under the Child Development Co-Savings Act. Section 5: Create holiday group 'Singapore Office Holidays 2026' with three holidays — New Year's Day (2026-01-01), Chinese New Year Day 1 (2026-02-17), National Day (2026-08-09). All three dates are independently verified against Singapore MOM official gazette. Section 6: In the Time module, create client 'APAC Regional Program', project 'Singapore Office Launch' linked to that client, two tasks ('Office Infrastructure Setup' and 'Client Onboarding Pipeline'), and allocate Wei Chen (EMP025) and Priya Sharma (EMP026) to the project. Time module uses tm_ prefixed tables (tm_clients, tm_projects, tm_tasks, tm_project_tasks, tm_project_employees). Section 7: Publish announcement with title 'APAC Regional Expansion — Singapore Office Opening'. The announcement body describes the new APAC office opening effective March 17, 2026. Key environment quirks: The Leave Types page is accessible only via /employeeleavetypes URL path (not /leavetypes, which returns 403). The Sentrifugo login credentials are admin@sentrifugo.local / Admin@Sfugo24. The dashboard URL is /index.php/welcome (not /dashboard). Existing data: 20 employees (EMP001-EMP020), 3 BUs (Technology Services, Corporate Services, Commercial Operations), 8 departments, 16 job titles, 6 leave types, 1 holiday group (US Federal Holidays). None of the task-required entities pre-exist. The employment status dropdown shows 'Full Time' (not 'Full-Time').
